urdu transliteration text: KHUN HUM BAHATAY HAI ZAKHM HUM SAJATAY HAI
english translation text: We spill our own blood; we proudly bear our wounds

urdu transliteration text: YE SALIKAY MAATAM KE AUR KISKO ATAY HAI
english translation text: Who else performs maatam the way we do?

urdu transliteration text: ROZ BARPA HOTI HAI MAJLIS-E ZAMANE ME
english translation text: Majalis are held in the world everyday

urdu transliteration text: HUM TO BAAGHE JANNAT ME ROZ ATAY JATAY HAI
english translation text: We walk into and out of the gardens of paradise everyday

urdu transliteration text: JA KE DEKHLAY DUNIYA AAJ BHI JULOOSON ME
english translation text: Let the world behold!  In the processions...

urdu transliteration text: UNKE SAR NAHIN JHUKTE JO ALAM UTHA-TAY HAI
english translation text: Unbowed remain the heads of those who carry the "alam"

urdu transliteration text: HUM GHULAAM-E HAYDAR HUMSE DEKHLAY DUNIYA
english translation text: We are the servants of Haider; let the people see

urdu transliteration text: KIS TARHA ZAMANAY ME INKILAAB LAATAY HAI
english translation text: How we bring about revolution in the world

urdu transliteration text: KYA JARI JIYALAY HAI SHEHR KARBALA WAALAY
english translation text: How brave and passionate are the residents of Karbala

urdu transliteration text: MOWT KE ILAAKAY ME ZINDAGI BANATE HAI
english translation text: Who live their lives in the region of death

urdu transliteration text: AAPKO BHI MILJAYE DEEN KA ALAM LAIKIN
english translation text: You too would get to hold the banner of the faith

urdu transliteration text: AAPKA BHAROSA KYA AAP BHAAG JAATAY HAI
english translation text: But alas, can those be trusted  who escape (the battlefield)

urdu transliteration text: TUM AGAR KARO MAATAM TUM BHI SEEKH JAAWOGAY
english translation text: Were you to do maatam, you would also have learned

urdu transliteration text: BAKHSHISHO KA DARWAZA KAISE KHAT KHATA TAY HAI
english translation text: How to knock upon the doors of divine forgiveness
